---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for SYNAPSE
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: HayreKhan750
---

## Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you want.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?
_Example: "As a developer, I want to... so that I can..."_

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add mockups, screenshots from similar products, or examples.

## Priority
- [ ] High (core feature, blocks other work)
- [ ] Medium (important, but not blocking)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

## Phase / Roadmap
Which phase does this belong to? (Ref: TASKS.md)
- [ ] Phase 1 — Core Platform
- [ ] Phase 2 — AI Layer
- [ ] Phase 3 — AI Chat
- [ ] Phase 4 — Automation
- [ ] Phase 5 — Agentic AI
- [ ] Phase 6 — Cloud Integration
- [ ] Phase 7 — UI/UX
- [ ] Phase 8 — Deployment
- [ ] Phase 9 — Post-Launch
